caption: In a brightly lit indoor studio, three people stand around white high-top tables against a white wall. On the left, a man in a dark blazer and trousers stands behind a table, gesturing with his hand. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied up wears a dark blue blazer over a red top and light-colored trousers, standing still behind her table. To the right, a man in a patterned brown shirt and dark trousers stands behind a third table, facing toward the other two. Each table is equipped with a microphone. Behind the man on the right is a large vertical banner featuring an image of hands and the text "INTERACTIE," "ESTHETISCHE PRAKTIJK," and "EN ZORGCREATIE." The logo "mediasite" is visible at the top of the scene. Across the frames, the people remain in their positions with minimal movement, maintaining their stances during the interaction.
